name: CHSP - 2
body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

Just checking in to see if any homes in your portal stood out to you so far.

Here’s your link again in case you haven’t had a chance to browse: %custom_ylopo_listing_alert%

If you’d like, I can also adjust your search to narrow things down (price range, location, style, etc.). Just let me know :)

Best,
subject: Let’s find the right home for you
